
1. Set up
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
```

2. Import datasets
```{r}
#Load Data
temp_raw <- read_excel("temperature.xlsx")
humid_raw   <- read_excel("relative_humidity.xlsx")
load_raw <- read_excel("load.xlsx")

```

3. Data Wrangling
```{r}
#Create a hourly data
#Temperature
temp_hourly <- temp_raw %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  mutate(temp_avg = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("t_ws")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select(date, hr, temp_avg)
 
head(temp_hourly)

#Humidity
humid_hourly <- humid_raw %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  mutate(humid_avg = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("rh_ws")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select(date, hr, humid_avg)
 
head(humid_hourly)

#Load
load_hourly <- load_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(meter_id)) %>%          
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  select(-meter_id) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = starts_with("h"),
    names_to  = "hr_str",
    values_to = "load_kwh"
  ) %>%
  mutate(hr = as.integer(sub("h", "", hr_str))) %>%  # "h1" → 1
  select(date, hr, load_kwh) %>%
  arrange(date, hr)
 
head(load_hourly)

#Create an hourly data
hourly_data <- load_hourly %>%
  left_join(temp_hourly, by = c("date", "hr")) %>%
  left_join(humid_hourly,   by = c("date", "hr")) %>%
  arrange(date, hr)

#Create a daily data
daily_data <- hourly_data %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(
    load_daily = sum(load_kwh,  na.rm = TRUE),
    temp_avg   = mean(temp_avg, na.rm = TRUE),
    humid_avg     = mean(humid_avg,   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups    = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(date)
```
